video_effect.notes: Set mode to: auto | light_streak | dark_streak | none. auto = renderer picks based on background average luma: light_streak for dark images (luma<110), dark_streak for bright images (luma>145), alternating bright+dark for mid-tone images.

light_streak.notes: 4 bright vertical strips sweeping left-right across the frame. Best for images with a dark background. Adds luma to create a glowing shimmer effect. 4 lanes evenly spaced (W/8, W/8*3, W/8*5, W/8*7), oscillation amplitude = W/8 (each strip stays in its lane). All strips sync on the same sine wave.

dark_streak.notes: 4 dark vertical strips sweeping left-right across the frame. Best for images with a bright background. Subtracts luma to create a shadow shimmer effect. Same 4-lane layout and sine-wave sync as light_streak.

Xiaoxiao DragonHD.notes: Customerservice style. Good for business news and professional narration.

Yunjian.notes: Relaxed narration style. Good for storytelling.
